title: Shared RightSidebar component that pushes the kanban board
description:
Build a reusable RightSidebar component that both the filter panel and the settings panel will use. When the sidebar opens, the kanban board animates to be narrower so the sidebar appears to push it left rather than overlapping or obscuring it. The sidebar sits at the same Z-level as the board with no backdrop overlay.

Scenario: Opening a right sidebar

Given the user is viewing the kanban board
When a right sidebar is opened (filter or settings)
Then the kanban board animates to become narrower
And the sidebar slides in from the right edge
And the sidebar appears at the same visual Z-level as the board columns (flat, not floating above)
And no overlay or dimming layer is applied to the board

Scenario: Closing a right sidebar

Given a right sidebar is open
When the user clicks the close button inside the sidebar
Then the sidebar slides back out to the right
And the kanban board animates back to full width

Scenario: Sidebar styling matches the board

Given the right sidebar is open
Then it uses the same flat card styling, background color, and border treatment as the board columns
And the same typeface, spacing, and color tokens as the rest of the application

Scenario: Only one right sidebar open at a time

Given the filter sidebar is open
When the user clicks the settings button
Then the filter sidebar closes
And the settings sidebar opens
And the board width reflects the single open sidebar
creator: ryan.porter
